zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Warren於1435年出生在英國爾波易頓時，他的父親John Warren III21歲，母親Isabel Stanley29歲。他於1480年與Eleanor Gerard在英國英格蘭藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是15個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1517年1月9日在他的家鄉享年82歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Warren于1435年出生在英国爾波易頓时，他的父亲John Warren III21岁，母亲Isabel Stanley29岁。他于1480年与Eleanor Gerard在英国英格兰藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是15个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1517年1月9日在他的家乡享年82岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Warren
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English (Old French) personal name Warin, Werin, a borrowing of ancient Germanic Warino, a short form of various compound names based on the element warin ‘protection, shelter’ or ‘guard’. Compare Waring .

English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from La Varrenne in Seine-Maritime, France, named with a Gaulish element probably descriptive of alluvial land or sandy soil. This was the name of a major Norman family after the Conquest. In Ireland, this name has been Gaelicized as Bharain.
Irish: adopted as an English form of Gaelic Ó Murnáin (see Murnane , Warner ).

variants.name: Warrens
meanings: English: variant of Warren with genitival or excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Warrener
meanings: English (of Norman origin): occupational name from Old French warrennier ‘warrener’, an officer employed to watch over game in a park or game preserve. Compare Warren .

variants.name: Murnane
meanings: Irish (Munster): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Murnáin, a shortened and dissimilated form of Ó Manannáin ‘descendant of Manannán’, name borne in Celtic mythology by a sea god associated with the Isle of Man. All three syllables appear in the variant Marrinan. This name has also been Anglicized as Warren and Warner .

variants.name: Warne
meanings: occasionally a habitational name from Wearne in Somerset. The place takes its name from a lost stream-name based on British verno- ‘alder, swamp’.

variants.name: Waring
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of Warren , from the Norman personal name Warin, derived from ancient Germanic Warino, a short form of various compound names based on the element warin ‘protection, shelter’ or ‘guard’. The name was popular in France and among the Normans (see Guerin ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Warren was born in 1435, in Poynton, Cheshire, England, his father, John Warren III, was 21 and his mother, Isabel Stanley, was 29. He married Eleanor Gerard in 1480, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 15 sons and 8 daughters. He died on 9 January 1517, in his hometown, at the age of 82, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Warren est né en 1435, à Poynton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, John Warren III, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Isabel Stanley, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor Gerard en 1480, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 15 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé le 9 janvier 1517, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 82 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Warren 1435 in Poynton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Warren III 21 und seine Mutter Isabel Stanley 29. Er hat 1480 in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Eleanor Gerard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 15 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb am 9. Januar 1517 im Alter von 82 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Warren è nato il nel 1435 nel Poynton, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, John Warren III, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Stanley, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor Gerard nel 1480, nel Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 15 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 9 gennaio 1517, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 82 anni, e fu sepolto a England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Warrenが1435年にイギリスチェシュアイアポイントンで生まれた時，父John Warren IIIは21歳，母Isabel Stanleyは29歳であった。1480年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアでEleanor Gerardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも15人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1517年1月9日に故郷で82歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Warren(이)가 1435년 영국 체실르 포이턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Warren III(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Stanley(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1480년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 Eleanor Gerard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1517년 1월 9일 그의 고향에서 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Warren nasceu em 1435, em Poynton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Warren III, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Stanley, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor Gerard em 1480, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 15 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de janeiro de 1517, em sua cidade natal, com 82 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Warren родился в 1435 г. в местности поинтон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Warren III было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Isabel Stanley, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor Gerard в 1480 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 15 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Он умер 9 января 1517 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 82 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия.

sm.from about 1475 to 1485: mai le e tusa o le 1475 e o'o I le 1485

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Warren nació en 1435, en Poynton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Warren III, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Isabel Stanley, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Eleanor Gerard en 1480, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 15 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 9 de enero de 1517, en su pueblo, a la edad de 82 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra.
